libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For nativeTest/runtime execution on JDK 25, set runtime system properties `-Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow` and `-Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true` for 5.0.1 as well. Meaningful WebClient coverage can use an in-process Vert.x HTTP server; no external service is required.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The artifact exposes OAuth2WebClient APIs and declares `io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2` as optional; only add that dependency if tests intentionally cover OAuth2-specific APIs.
Local Gradle and Native Image verification remain authoritative for confirming whether the Netty/JDK 25 runtime properties fully resolve the native run failure.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 resolves to Vert.x 5.0.1 and Netty 4.2.2.Final; the existing 5.0.0 test scaffold already shows Netty 4.2.x needs explicit unsafe-access runtime properties on Java 25 native runs, but its condition is version-pinned to 5.0.0.
